name: oinkologne-male
flavor_texts: Oinkologne is proud of its fine, glossy skin. It emits a concentrated scent from the tip of its tail.
It entrances female Pokémon with the sweet, alluring scent that wafts from all over its body.
text: Oinkologne-male is the Hog Pokémon. It is a normal-type Pokémon. Abilities: lingering-aroma, gluttony, thick-fat (hidden). Base stats — HP: 110, Attack: 100, Defense: 75, Sp. Atk: 59, Sp. Def: 80, Speed: 65. Evolution line: lechonk → oinkologne. Lore: Oinkologne is proud of its fine, glossy skin. It emits a concentrated scent from the tip of its tail. It entrances female Pokémon with the sweet, alluring scent that wafts from all over its body.
